value.original: Contiene la traducción al español (España) de todos los módulos que forman parte de la distribución de Openbravo 3.0

row.value: Contiene la traducción al español (España) de todos los módulos que forman parte de la distribución de Openbravo 3.0

value.original: Licensed under the Openbravo Public License version 1.1. You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.openbravo.com/legal/license.html or in the legal folder of the Openbravo ERP core distribution.

row.value: Licensed under the Openbravo Public License version 1.1. You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.openbravo.com/legal/license.html or in the legal folder of the Openbravo ERP core distribution.

value.original: Merged two translation modules: * Aging Balance report Spanish Translation. * Report: Cash Flow Forecast - Spanish (Spain) Translation

row.value: Merged two translation modules: * Aging Balance report Spanish Translation. * Report: Cash Flow Forecast - Spanish (Spain) Translation
